bundle_approvals.notes: Initial official-source extraction, formula binding, and monitor validation completed; independent second reviewer still required.

publication_blockers: Second reviewer approval is still required for bundle-level paper publication.

AP_definition.invite: An INVITE client transaction starts on an unreliable transport.
AP_definition.invite_rsp: A matching SIP response (provisional or final) is observed for that INVITE transaction.

trace_mapping.invite: TimedTraceEvent mapped from the first outbound INVITE replay event for a transaction, labeled with invite plus a transaction helper such as sip_tx_<hash>.
trace_mapping.invite_rsp: TimedTraceEvent mapped from a SIP response replay event correlated to that same INVITE transaction, labeled with invite_rsp plus the matching sip_tx_<hash> helper.

extraction_notes.review: single-agent draft; second reviewer still required for paper artifact
extraction_notes.runtime_binding: AFLNet timed traces now export transaction-aware invite/invite_rsp labels for correlated SIP INVITE responses.

approvals.notes: Initial extraction and replay validation completed; second reviewer still required.

blockers: Second reviewer approval required before paper publication.

cards.original_clause: If an unreliable transport is being used, the client transaction MUST start timer A with a value of T1. When timer A fires, the client transaction MUST retransmit the request. The default value for T1 is 500 ms.

AP_definition.invite: An initial INVITE client transaction request is observed on an unreliable transport.
AP_definition.rtx: A retransmitted INVITE for the same client transaction is observed.

trace_mapping.invite: TimedTraceEvent mapped from the first outbound INVITE replay event for a transaction, labeled with invite plus a transaction helper such as sip_tx_<hash>.
trace_mapping.rtx: TimedTraceEvent mapped from a later outbound INVITE replay event for that same transaction, labeled with rtx plus the matching sip_tx_<hash> helper.

extraction_notes.review: single-agent draft; second reviewer still required for paper artifact
extraction_notes.runtime_binding: AFLNet timed traces now export transaction-aware invite/rtx labels keyed by the same sip_tx_<hash> helper for the INVITE transaction.

approvals.notes: Initial extraction and replay validation completed; second reviewer still required.

blockers: Second reviewer approval required before paper publication.

cards.original_clause: For unreliable INVITE transactions, timer A starts at T1 and doubles after each retransmission.

AP_definition.rtx1: The first retransmitted INVITE for a client transaction is observed on an unreliable transport.
AP_definition.rtx2: The second retransmitted INVITE for the same client transaction is observed.

trace_mapping.rtx1: TimedTraceEvent mapped from the first outbound INVITE replay event after the initial invite, labeled with both rtx and rtx1 plus the transaction-local sip_tx_<hash> helper.
trace_mapping.rtx2: TimedTraceEvent mapped from the second outbound INVITE replay event after the initial invite, labeled with both rtx and rtx2 plus the same sip_tx_<hash> helper.

extraction_notes.review: single-agent draft; second reviewer still required for paper artifact
extraction_notes.runtime_binding: AFLNet timed traces now export replay-aligned SIP ordinal retransmission labels such as rtx1/rtx2 alongside the generic rtx label when later INVITE retries are materialized.

approvals.notes: Initial extraction and replay validation completed; second reviewer still required.

blockers: Second reviewer approval required before paper publication.

cards.original_clause: Initial timer = 1 second; double at each retransmission; cap >= 60 seconds.

AP_definition.ch: A DTLS ClientHello flight is transmitted.
AP_definition.rtx: A retransmission of the same ClientHello flight is transmitted.

trace_mapping.ch: TimedTraceEvent mapped from the first ClientHello flight, labeled with ch on the first outbound clienthello replay event.
trace_mapping.rtx: TimedTraceEvent mapped from a later outbound ClientHello replay event, labeled with rtx after the first observed clienthello flight.

extraction_notes.review: single-agent draft; second reviewer still required for paper artifact
extraction_notes.runtime_binding: AFLNet timed traces now export replay-aligned ch/rtx labels for ClientHello retransmission timing.

approvals.notes: Initial extraction and replay validation completed; second reviewer still required.

blockers: Second reviewer approval required before paper publication.

cards.original_clause: Initial timer = 1 second; double at each retransmission; cap >= 60 seconds.

AP_definition.rtx1: The first retransmission of a DTLS ClientHello flight is transmitted.
AP_definition.rtx2: The second retransmission of the same DTLS ClientHello flight is transmitted.

trace_mapping.rtx1: TimedTraceEvent mapped from the first outbound ClientHello replay event after the initial ch, labeled with both rtx and rtx1.
trace_mapping.rtx2: TimedTraceEvent mapped from the second outbound ClientHello replay event after the initial ch, labeled with both rtx and rtx2.

extraction_notes.review: single-agent draft; second reviewer still required for paper artifact
extraction_notes.runtime_binding: AFLNet timed traces now export replay-aligned DTLS ordinal retransmission labels such as rtx1/rtx2 alongside the generic rtx label when later ClientHello retries are materialized.

approvals.notes: Initial extraction and replay validation completed; second reviewer still required.

blockers: Second reviewer approval required before paper publication.

cards.original_clause: Disconnect if login is not successful; default = 120 seconds.

AP_definition.conn_open: A new unauthenticated SSH connection is established.
AP_definition.auth_done: The session either authenticates successfully or disconnects due to grace-period expiry.

trace_mapping.conn_open: TimedTraceEvent mapped from the first outbound SSH identification replay event, labeled with conn_open at the start of the transport/auth session.
trace_mapping.auth_done: TimedTraceEvent mapped from a correlated SSH response event labeled with auth_done when the replayed response sequence contains userauth_success or disconnect before/at grace expiry.

extraction_notes.spec_snapshot: OpenBSD sshd_config manual page snapshot accessed 2026-06-17
extraction_notes.review: single-agent draft; second reviewer still required for paper artifact
extraction_notes.runtime_binding: AFLNet timed traces now export replay-aligned conn_open/auth_done labels for SSH login-grace timing, using the first outbound identification event and correlated userauth_success or disconnect response events.

approvals.notes: Initial extraction and replay validation completed; second reviewer still required.

blockers: Second reviewer approval required before paper publication.

cards.original_clause: The Session timeout parameter defaults to 60 seconds; the server may tear down the RTSP session after no client liveness information for the default one-minute interval.

AP_definition.session_open: An RTSP session is established by a successful SETUP response carrying a Session identifier.
AP_definition.session_activity: A subsequent RTSP request or other liveness indication for the same session is observed before the server times the session out.

trace_mapping.session_open: TimedTraceEvent mapped from a successful RTSP SETUP response carrying a Session identifier, labeled with session_open plus a helper such as rtsp_sess_<hash>.
trace_mapping.session_activity: TimedTraceEvent mapped from a later session-scoped RTSP request whose Session header matches that same helper token, labeled with session_activity plus the matching rtsp_sess_<hash>.

extraction_notes.target_alignment: Matches the Live555 RTSP fuzz target's session/liveness behavior discussed in AFLNet materials
extraction_notes.review: single-agent draft; second reviewer still required for paper artifact
extraction_notes.runtime_binding: AFLNet timed traces now export replay-aligned session_open/session_activity labels keyed by the same rtsp_sess_<hash> helper derived from the Session identifier.

approvals.notes: Initial extraction and replay validation completed; second reviewer still required.

blockers: Second reviewer approval required before paper publication.

cards.original_clause: dcmqrscp uses an ACSE message timeout of 30 seconds by default.

AP_definition.assoc_req: A DICOM association / ACSE handshake is initiated toward dcmqrscp.
AP_definition.acse_rsp: The matching ACSE response message for that association is observed.

trace_mapping.assoc_req: TimedTraceEvent mapped from an outgoing DICOM association request sequence, labeled with assoc_req on the A-ASSOCIATE-RQ replay event.
trace_mapping.acse_rsp: TimedTraceEvent mapped from the corresponding ACSE response sequence, labeled with acse_rsp on the correlated A-ASSOCIATE-AC or A-ASSOCIATE-RJ response event.

extraction_notes.target_alignment: Matches the AFLNet dcmqrscp tutorial, which launches dcmqrscp without overriding default timeout options
extraction_notes.review: single-agent draft; second reviewer still required for paper artifact
extraction_notes.runtime_binding: AFLNet timed traces now export replay-aligned assoc_req/acse_rsp labels for DICOM ACSE association timing.

approvals.notes: Initial extraction and replay validation completed; second reviewer still required.

blockers: Second reviewer approval required before paper publication.

AP_definition.mail: An outbound SMTP MAIL command is observed.
AP_definition.mail_rsp: The correlated terminal SMTP reply for that MAIL command is observed.

trace_mapping.mail: TimedTraceEvent mapped from an outbound SMTP request line whose parsed request class is mail.
trace_mapping.mail_rsp: TimedTraceEvent mapped from the last response event emitted for that same SMTP MAIL request, labeled with mail_rsp and optionally a raw reply-code helper such as rsp_250 or rsp_550.

extraction_notes.target_alignment: Matches the ProFuzzBench Exim SMTP subject, whose replay corpus includes MAIL FROM requests and whose server-side default command handling is exercised without overriding RFC-level timeout minima.
extraction_notes.review: single-agent draft; second reviewer still required for paper artifact
extraction_notes.runtime_binding: AFLNet timed traces now preserve raw SMTP reply-code labels and a correlated mail_rsp helper on the terminal response event for a MAIL command.

approvals.notes: Initial extraction and monitor-oriented trace binding completed; second reviewer still required.
